backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries mapping frontend files to implemented UI features and associated components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries for key frontend source files including App, UI button, utilities, CSS, and Tailwind config.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind setup with OKLCH color variables, light/dark themes, and base style application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point providing root mount element and loading the main React script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component implementing hero UI, interactive button with click feedback, and a stats card.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, state, and persisted identities.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the app’s emerald/teal OKLCH theme, dark mode vars, and animation utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports cn() helper to merge Tailwind classes using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Renders the app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, typography, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the project's state, listing existing button-related features, a pending new feature request, and metadata such as versions and project details.
